ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Release year of the film */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average audience rating */,
  "metascore" INTEGER /* Metascore indicating critical reception */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the film */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the film */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the film's poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the film's trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Country of origin or nationality of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Drama, Thriller) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "film_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film-genre relationship */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_genres_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film related to the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., review, rating) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "critics" (
  "critic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each critic */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the critic */,
  "publication" TEXT /* Publication the critic writes for */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating given by the critic */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being rated */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the critic's review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("critic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_critics_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "followed_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_followed_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("followed_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended film */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_recommendations_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
